title: Add pagination to GET /api/tasks
prompt: Add cursor-based pagination to the GET /api/tasks endpoint. The response should support a `cursor` query parameter and return a `next_cursor` in the response body. Update the TypeScript API client and the useTaskCommands hook.

rubric.notes: Multi-surface high-risk change: API contract, backend, frontend. Adversarial review is required. Spec must be created before code changes.
